name: Baleful Scion
description: You increase one ability score of your choice by 1. Once per turn, when you damage a creature you can see within 60 feet of yourself, you can deal an extra 1d6 + proficiency bonus necrotic damage to it and regain hit points equal to the necrotic damage dealt. You can use this benefit a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, regaining all uses after a long rest.
